utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想聽啲新歌。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢度有 En Vogue 嘅《Whatta Man》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀，呢首歌幾好聽。播首慢啲嘅歌啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 核突。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 唔好意思。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 講笑啫。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢度有 Janet Jackson 嘅《Anytime, Anyplace》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我好鍾意呢首歌呀，真係好好聽。佢令我諗起我細佬。播啲 Michael Jackson 嘅歌啦，咖啡店風格嗰種。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢度有 Michael Jackson 嘅《Stranger In Moscow》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我好鍾意呢首歌。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我嘅音樂品味好到無得彈。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 播佢《Off the Wall》專輯入面嘅歌點呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢度有 Michael Jackson 嘅《Off The Wall》專輯入面嘅《I Can't Help It》。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 婚禮宴會音樂。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀，幾好喎。拜拜，今日就到呢度啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 拜拜。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想聽 Linkin Park 嘅歌。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢度係 Linkin Park 唱嘅《Numb》。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 已經傳送咗影片畀用戶。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我可能想聽呢隊樂隊舊啲嘅歌。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢度係 Linkin Park 唱嘅《Points of Authority》。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 已經傳送咗影片畀用戶。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我唔鍾意呢首。播返同一首歌，但係唔同歌手唱嘅。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢度係 vice-versa 唱嘅 Linkin Park 嘅《Points of Authority》。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 已經傳送咗影片畀用戶。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 佢哋唱得麻麻哋，我覺得原版好聽啲。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我都係咁話。好啦，我搞掂啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好。祝你晚安。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 唔該。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有咩可以幫到你？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你可唔可以播首 Moore 嘅歌畀我聽？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 可以。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我諗佢係 Dayna 嘅歌手。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 等我查吓資料庫。等一陣。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 如果有幫助嘅話，我諗佢全名係 Karen Marie Alston。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我相信呢位就係你搵緊嘅歌手，呢度係 Moe 唱嘅《Final Song》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀，就係佢喇，不過呢首歌我聽過好多次喇。你可唔可以搵首佢其他嘅歌？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢度係 Moe 唱嘅《Walk This Way》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 佢最新嘅歌係邊首？我唔知我係咪想播呢首。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 佢最新嘅單曲係《When I was Young》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀。呢首好啱。唔該晒。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔使客氣，好開心幫到你。請欣賞音樂。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。有咩可以幫到你？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好。我想聽 Katy Perry 嘅歌。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 呢首歌唔錯。播呢位歌手舊啲嘅歌啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Katy Perry 嘅《Firework》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 呢首歌都唔錯。播呢位歌手其他專輯嘅歌啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Katy Perry 嘅《California Gurls》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 呢首歌都好好聽。好啦，我搞掂啦。拜拜。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好。可唔可以播August Burns Red嘅《Invisible Enemy》呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: August Burns Red嘅《Invisible Enemy》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 可唔可以播啲舊啲嘅歌呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: August Burns Red嘅《Speech Impediment》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我唔係好想聽呢首。可唔可以播August Burns Red嘅另一首呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀。August Burns Red嘅《The Wake》。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 咁樣得唔得呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀，呢首歌好好聽，好正。多謝你。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 可唔可以播Taylor Swift嘅歌呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢度係Taylor Swift嘅《22》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我唔係好鍾意呢首。你可唔可以播佢新啲嘅歌呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢度係Taylor Swift嘅《Gorgeous》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 唔好。呢首最近電台成日播，我唔係好鍾意呢首歌。你可唔可以搵同一隻碟嘅另一首呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢度係Taylor Swift嘅《Ready For It》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀，好好。多謝你。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好，我想聽Fleetwood Mac嘅歌。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我幫你搵緊呀。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢首歌叫《Dreams》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 播佢哋另一隻碟嘅歌好唔好呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢首歌叫《Gypsy》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 唔係，我唔係好鍾意呢首。播Heart嘅歌好唔好呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢位歌手叫Heart。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀，嗰隊樂隊。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 仲有冇其他需要呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀，我想聽另一位歌手嘅歌，就係Heart呢隊樂隊。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你冇收到咩？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 冇呀，我冇聽到任何嘢。哦，原來係被封鎖咗。播另一首好唔好呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔好意思。我會再搵另一首歌。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 咁就好啦。好好。多謝你。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 仲有冇其他需要呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 冇啦，我搞掂啦。多謝。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 再見。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 拜拜。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好，可唔可以播Joyner Lucas嘅歌呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢度係Joyner Lucas嘅《I'm not racist》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 呢首歌好有深度。你可唔可以播啲Joyner Lucas做featuring嘅歌呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你可唔可以重複一次條問題呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我鍾意呢首歌。你可唔可以播啲Joyner Lucas做featuring嘅歌呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢度係Tech Nine featuring Logic同Joyner Lucas嘅《Sriracha》。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 請等一陣。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢度係Joyner Lucas嘅另一首歌《Panda Remix》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我好鍾意呢啲歌。好多謝你揀咗咁多好歌。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 再見，祝你有美好嘅一日。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好。我而家冇乜靈感。你可唔可以幫下我呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想發掘一啲新歌嚟聽。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，你可唔可以話我知你鍾意邊個歌手嘅名呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Paul Simon。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你有冇聽過一個叫Peter Gabriel嘅歌手呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 冇呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 等一等呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你想聽吓其他歌手嘅歌嗎？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 類似Peter Gabriel嘅？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你有冇聽過一個叫Tom Waits嘅歌手呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 冇呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 今日仲有冇其他嘢幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 搞掂晒啦。唔該晒。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 祝你今日愉快。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好，我想聽吓Radiohead嘅歌。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Radiohead - I Promise。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀，可唔可以聽吓佢哋專輯入面嘅歌呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Radiohead - Paranoid Android。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 其實我唔係好鍾意呢首歌。可唔可以聽吓佢哋嘅Exit Music呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢度係你嘅歌。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 呢首歌我真係好鍾意。好多謝你幫忙。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 唔該晒。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔使客氣，你鍾意就好啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 可唔可以播首藍調歌俾我聽呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: John Lee Hooker - Boom Boom。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 其實你可唔可以播首新少少嘅爵士樂呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 當然可以啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Crazy - Gnarls Barkley (Space Jazz Cover) ft. Hannah Gill & Casey Abrams。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 可唔可以播首唔係翻唱嘅呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 可以呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Sade - No ordinary love。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 可唔可以播首慢少少嘅呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 當然可以啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Come fly with me - Devil Blues。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我諗我其實鍾意嗰首Crazy Fest嘅翻唱。真係好難忘。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 遲啲見，拜拜。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 拜拜。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好，我想聽吓Katy Perry嘅歌呀，唔該。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好，有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我唔係好想聽嗰個。不如聽吓舊啲嘅歌呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 呢首歌好好聽，節奏感好好。好多謝你，搞掂晒啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好選擇，唔使客氣。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 拜拜。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 雖然睇到佢咁做有啲奇怪。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀，係咁㗎喇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 咁下次再傾啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 拜拜。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 再見。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 哈囉。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好，有咩可以幫到你？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想聽啲鄉村音樂。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有冇邊個你鍾意嘅鄉村歌手呀？咁我可以幫你搵啲類似嘅歌手。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 冇特別偏好。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢首係Garth Brooks嘅歌《Friends in Low Places》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 可唔可以聽啲舊派啲嘅歌呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢首係The Judds嘅歌《Why Not Me》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 可唔可以聽啲男歌手唱嘅歌呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢首係Eddie Rabbitt嘅歌《Driving My Life Away》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好啦。咁有冇啲似Johnny Cash嘅歌呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢首係Nick Cave & The Bad Seeds嘅歌《That Jesus Alone》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 總之，我聽夠喇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 拜拜，下次再傾啦。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 哈囉，我想聽blink-182嘅歌。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好呀，用戶。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: blink-182嘅《All The Small Things》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 呢首歌好好聽。播啲呢隊樂隊新啲嘅歌啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: blink 182嘅《Cynical》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 呢首歌都OK啦。播啲呢隊樂隊舊啲嘅歌啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: blink-182嘅《I Miss You》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 呢首歌都好好聽。播啲唔同專輯嘅歌啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，祝你今日愉快，拜拜。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: blink-182嘅《Adam song》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 呢首歌好好聽。好啦，我聽完喇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好，有咩可以幫到你？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 哈囉。可唔可以聽Green Day嘅新歌呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，你可唔可以話我知你鍾意邊個歌手嘅名呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Green Day。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Green Day。等我睇吓仲有咩可以搵到。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你熟唔熟Fall Out Boy同埋System of a Down呢兩隊樂隊呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 唔熟，不過我想聽吓。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢首係你嘅歌。Fall Out Boy嘅《Immortals (From "Big Hero 6")》。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢隊係另一隊樂隊System of a Down。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀，聽吓啦。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好正。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我仲鍾意第二首多啲。好多謝你呀，助理。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 太好喇，祝你今日愉快。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好。我想搵歌聽，可唔可以幫吓手呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，我可以幫你。你鍾意聽咩類型嘅音樂呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 播啲The Beatles嘅歌好唔好呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢首係The Beatles嘅歌《Hey Jude》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 可唔可以聽啲唔同專輯嘅歌呀？頭先嗰首都OK，不過試吓唔同嘅啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢首係The Beatles嘅歌《Here Comes the Sun》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 呢首真係經典，我鍾意呀，不過可唔可以播啲新啲嘅歌呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢首係The Beatles專輯《Let It Be》入面嘅歌《Let It Be》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 星期五收工嚟講，呢個真係個唔錯嘅選擇。唔該晒你幫手。
